catalog_row.Paper: Monetary and Macroprudential Policy in an Estimated DSGE Model of the Euro Area
catalog_row.ModelType: Two-country two-sector estimated New Keynesian DSGE with housing, mortgage default risk, and macroprudential policy
catalog_row.Category: Monetary union; housing; financial frictions; macroprudential policy
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Savers and borrowers; durable housing; domestic and international financial intermediaries; mortgage default thresholds; Calvo pricing; ECB Taylor rule; national macroprudential rules; sectoral preference, technology, risk, premium, and monetary shocks
